title: DataReport
description: A MOCJ publication — a report, brief, fact sheet, scorecard, data report, or data story. Canonical schema reconciling several WordPress custom post types on criminaljustice.cityofnewyork.us: 'data_reports' (109), 'briefs' (54), 'reports' (26), and 'data_stories' (6). These are the office's real 'data' product: mostly PDF/narrative explainers (e.g. jail-population increase, re-arrest rates), sometimes with a downloadable source-data file. There is no Open Data twin; the only structured access is the accidental wp/v2 REST API.

kind.description: Which MOCJ publication family this is.

sourceDataUrl.description: Downloadable source-data file backing an explainer, if published.
